REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (135 Wawona Street, San Francisco, Ca 94127)
Off Calendar May-06-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Rena Harel.

The Court received the re-appraisal this morning. The sale was confirmed at $1,175,000.00. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the written order). An additional bond in the amount of $350,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Off Calendar

Petition For Authority To List And Sell Settlor'S Former Residence
Off Calendar Mar-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Rena Harel (Trustee).

Mr. Schultz stated that Court appointed Counsel for the Conservatee was in favor of the sale of the property, that there was a reverse mortgage on the property, that the Conservatee understood the proposed sale, that She agreed to it, that he had a meeting with the Family and that they investigated the Conservatee returning home with different care. In addition, Mr. Schultz stated that it was very important to the Conservatee to keep her current Care Giver, that she could do so by staying at the Eden Villa, that she understands that she will be able to preserve her estate, that none of the Conservatee's Children could qualify to keep the house, that both Children were living in the third house and that it was in the best interest of the Conservatee to go forward. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the written order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Clauzel.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
